items.headline: claude agents --json opens scripting headroom
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.145 ships `claude agents --json` for machine-readable agent output, making agent invocations composable in shell pipelines. That's directly useful for the scout/reviewer workflow here, which currently parses agent output by convention. The same release fixes MCP slash command error messages — relevant for ADO MCP Server, where malformed slash commands previously returned opaque errors.
